C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\main_logic.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\main_logic.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\main_logic.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cc.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\main_logic.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o main_logic.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libmain_logic.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\main_logic.dir\linkLibs.rsp
